description: G35 - IR17 Suspense Cash and Expense Clear

sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone = '2' and PTF in ('U3455','U3460')
update TransX set Amt1 = coalesce(Amt1,0), Amt2 = coalesce(Amt2,0), Amt3 = coalesce(Amt3,0) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co = '2999'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[version]' = 'First' and Flex3 = '3'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Flex1) (Select KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Rate1,Rate2,Rate3,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data3' as KeyID, t.Co,t.Crcy,t.GL,t.PC,t.CC,t.Amt1,t.Amt2,t.Amt3,c.Cat_Override as CCcat, c.Deferrable * 100 as Rate1, c.Attributable * 100 as Rate2, c.Amt1 as Rate3, c.Co as Flex1, c.Portfolio_Nbr, c.Portfolio_PC as Flex2 from TransX t inner join IR17_CC c on t.CC = c.CC and t.GL = c.GL and c.Typ = 'CC_PC_GL' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone = '1')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Flex3,Flex4,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1 * Rate1 * Rate3,Amt2 * Rate1 * Rate3,Amt3 * Rate1 * Rate3,CCcat, 'Y' as Deferrable_Flag, 'Y' as Attributable_Flag, Flex1, Flex2,Location from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Rate1 <= Rate2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Flex3,Flex4,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1 * (100-Rate1) * Rate3,Amt2 * (100-Rate1) * Rate3,Amt3 * (100-Rate1) * Rate3,CCcat, 'N' as Deferrable_Flag, 'N' as Attributable_Flag, Flex1, Flex2,Location from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Rate1 >= Rate2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Flex3,Flex4,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1 * Rate2 * Rate3,Amt2 * Rate2 * Rate3,Amt3 * Rate2 * Rate3,CCcat, 'Y' as Deferrable_Flag, 'Y' as Attributable_Flag, Flex1, Flex2,Location from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Rate1 > Rate2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Flex3,Flex4,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1 * (Rate1 - Rate2) * Rate3,Amt2 * (Rate1 - Rate2) * Rate3,Amt3 * (Rate1 - Rate2) * Rate3,CCcat, 'Y' as Deferrable_Flag, 'N' as Attributable_Flag, Flex1, Flex2,Location from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Rate1 > Rate2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Flex3,Flex4,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1 * (100-Rate2) * Rate3,Amt2 * (100-Rate2) * Rate3,Amt3 * (100-Rate2) * Rate3,CCcat, 'N' as Deferrable_Flag, 'N' as Attributable_Flag, Flex1, Flex2,Location from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Rate1 < Rate2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Flex3,Flex4,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1 * (Rate2 - Rate1) * Rate3,Amt2 * (Rate2 - Rate1) * Rate3,Amt3 * (Rate2 - Rate1) * Rate3,CCcat, 'N' as Deferrable_Flag, 'Y' as Attributable_Flag, Flex1, Flex2,Location from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Rate1 < Rate2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
Update TransX set Flex5 = '5600000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Flex3 = 'Y' and Flex4 = 'Y' and CCcat in ('U','S','A')
Update TransX set Flex5 = '5600062' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Flex4 = 'Y' and CCcat in ('C','H')
Update TransX set Flex5 = '5620000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Flex4 = 'N'
Update TransX set Flex5 = '5600001' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Flex3 = 'N' and Flex4 = 'Y' and CCcat in ('U','S','A')

Update t set Flex6 = m.UD3 from TransX t inner join osAccountMap3 m on t.GL >= m.GL_From and t.GL <= m.GL_Thru and m.Co_Thru = '9999' and m.TTY = '' and m.TP_From = '' and m.BC_From = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4'
Update TransX set Flex6 = 'U3451' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and GL = '6420000'
Update TransX set Flex6 = 'U' + cast(substring(GL,4,4) as varchar(4)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and GL like '698%'
Update TransX set Flex6 = 'U3010' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Flex6 in ('U3040','U3145','U3146','U3170')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data5' as KeyID, Flex1 as Co,Crcy,Flex5 as GL,Location as PC,Flex6 as PTF,round(sum(Amt1/100),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2/100),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3/100),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' group by Flex1,Crcy,Flex5,Location,Flex6)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data5' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Zone in ('2','3') group by Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data5' as KeyID, x.Co,x.Crcy,'5600000' as GL,m.Field1 as PC,'U3010' as PTF,round(-sum(x.Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(x.Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(-sum(x.Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m on x.Co = m.Descr and m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'DefaultPCbyCo' where x.KeyID = '[batchID]-data5' group by x.Co,x.Crcy,m.Field1)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
Update TransX set Amt1 = Amt1/100, Amt2 = Amt2/100, Amt3 = Amt3/100 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,'Exp Topside [yyyy-mm-dd]' as Txt,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID, Co,Crcy,'5600000' as GL,PC,'U3455' as PTF,'Exp Topside [yyyy-mm-dd] 5620000 roll' as Txt,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5620000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID, Co,Crcy,'2851017' as GL,PC,'' as PTF,'Exp Topside [yyyy-mm-dd] 5620000 roll' as Txt,round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2, round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5620000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,'2150001' as GL,PC,'' as PTF,'U1801' as ProdCode,'824' as TTY,'Exp Topside [yyyy-mm-dd] 5600062 roll' as Txt,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600062' group by Co,Crcy,PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,'2150001' as GL,PC,'' as PTF,'U1801' as ProdCode,'603' as TTY,'Exp Topside [yyyy-mm-dd] 5600062 roll' as Txt,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600062' group by Co,Crcy,PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,'2150001' as GL,PC,'' as PTF,'U1801' as ProdCode,'612' as TTY,'Exp Topside [yyyy-mm-dd] 5600001 roll' as Txt,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600001' group by Co,Crcy,PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,'2150001' as GL,PC,'' as PTF,'U1801' as ProdCode,'610' as TTY,'Exp Topside [yyyy-mm-dd] 5600001 roll' as Txt,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600001' group by Co,Crcy,PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,'2150000' as GL,PC,'' as PTF,'U1804' as ProdCode,'607' as TTY,'Exp Topside [yyyy-mm-dd] 5600000 roll' as Txt,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600000' group by Co,Crcy,PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,'2150000' as GL,PC,'' as PTF,'U1804' as ProdCode,'602' as TTY,'Exp Topside [yyyy-mm-dd] 5600000 roll' as Txt,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600000' group by Co,Crcy,PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '1' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL group by KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (not PK in ('40','50') or PK is NULL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set SubProd = 'G35', Flex1 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd, Amt1) values ('[batchID]','[pass]',
insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd, Amt2) values ('[batchID]','[pass]',
insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd, Amt3) values ('[batchID]','[pass]',
